name: AnalysisPartEnd
summary: The AnalysisPartEnd class contains information related to analysis part ends.

constructors.name: AnalysisPartEnd
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisPartEnd class

properties.name: Condition
properties.summary: The condition of the part end.

properties.name: Connectivity
properties.summary: The connectivity of the part end.

properties.name: Eccentricity
properties.summary: The eccentricity of the part end (in the local coordinate system).

properties.name: EccentricityMode
properties.summary: The eccentricity mode of the part end.

properties.name: Support
properties.summary: The support of the part end.

properties.name: SupportCoordSystem
properties.summary: The coordinate system of the support.
